metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_224
metadata.comment:
Rationale: CTTNBP2 interacts with the actin-binding protein cortactin (CTTN; SynGo ID 223) and is localized in dendritic spines, co-localizing with PSD-95 and F-actin.

9/3/2017 Pim:
-literal; "Together, these immunofluorescence experiments identified the synaptic distribution of CTTNBP2 in cultured neurons and mouse brains and suggested an association of CTTNBP2 with actin cytoskeletons.". Experimental description: from the figure legend: "Immunohistochemistry of adult mouse hippocampus with CTTNBP2 antibody" (Figure 3). Also, shows dendritic spine localization in rat hippocampal neurons.

9/3/2017 Pim:
-species of cultured neurons (Fig.3A-D) is **rat**.
-species of brain slices (Fig.3E) is **mouse**.
-Species of the myc-tagged over-expressed CTTNBP2 proteins is **mouse** since cloned from RIKEN sequence RIKEN 4732477G22 and IMAGE 6833056.
-Final annotation made against **mouse**

checks.label: OWL Consistency
